summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Kelly criterion: g(f)=p log(1+bf)+(1-p) log(1-f) with p=0.55, b=1. BLUE growth curve via always_redraw on ValueTracker p_tr; RED optimum dot at f*=p-(1-p)/b with dashed vertical. ValueTracker f_tr sweeps YELLOW probe. Phase 2: p morphs through {0.7, 0.3, 0.85, 0.55}. Live p, f, g(f), f*.
